_comment: Maps loc IDs to multi-floor stair traversal config. 'floors' = total floor count. 'dest' = fixed destination tile (x, y) at the target level — mirrors OSRS packet dump behavior where top-floor/bottom-floor always lands on a specific tile adjacent to the partner staircase, regardless of where the player was standing.
_format: locId -> { floors: number, dest?: { x: number, y: number } }. Level is computed from floors + current level. dest is optional; if omitted, falls back to nearest-walkable from player tile.
